name: b2c-cli
description: B2C CLI Skills for Salesforce Commerce Cloud development.

interface.shortDescription: Use the Salesforce B2C Commerce CLI from your AI assistant.
interface.longDescription: Skills for driving the Salesforce B2C Commerce CLI — deploy cartridges, run jobs, manage On-Demand Sandboxes, stream logs, and perform WebDAV operations without leaving your editor.
defaultPrompt: Deploy the cartridges in ./cartridges to my sandbox
Run the reindex job on my sandbox
Create a new On-Demand Sandbox with a 48-hour TTL
Tail the latest error logs from my instance
